test_commands:
docker run --rm --tmpfs /run/secrets -e PATH=/tmp:$PATH --entrypoint sh $IMAGE_REF -c "printf '#!/bin/sh
env
' > /tmp/pihole-exporter && chmod +x /tmp/pihole-exporter && printf '  test-token  
' > /run/secrets/pihole_api_token && /entrypoint.sh | grep -q 'PIHOLE_API_TOKEN=test-token'"
